title: Can I create a button on a Monday.com Dashboard?
excerpt:
Can I create a button on a Monday.com Dashboard? 
I’d like the normal dashboard summary widgets and to add a “New Project” button on the dashboard. Is this possible

posts.author: MikeNew (Mike New)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can I create a button on a Monday.com Dashboard?

I’d like the normal dashboard summary widgets and to add a “New Project” button on the dashboard. Is this possible

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Mike! Would you want this button to create a new board or a new task/item for the “New Project”?

If you’re just looking to add a new item, you can actually do that within a table widget (or other widget showing items) in your Dashboard by adding a new item as you would within your regular board! This change will show up in the original board too.

Is this what you were looking for or not quite? Let us know!
